title: Kingdom of the Drowned Skull
description: a pirate adventure with deadly creatures lurking under
body:
📜 Description:
The seas are lawless, the islands uncharted, and the legends—deadly. Whispers speak of Captain Blackwater’s hidden treasure buried deep within a cursed archipelago. But beware: the waters are crawling with rival pirates, sea beasts, and ancient traps. Only the boldest will survive… or plunder it all.

🗺️ Explore procedurally generated islands filled with pirate bases, shipwrecks, hidden caves, and treasure.
⚓ Build your own pirate haven, sail the seas, or raid other crews.
🏴‍☠️ Battle cursed skeleton pirates, hostile factions, and deadly bosses.
💰 Loot treasure chests, upgrade gear, and uncover buried secrets.
🧬 Choose unique origins or classes (like Pirate, Buccaneer, Navigator, etc.) for new abilities.

🧭 Features:
🌴 Island-only world generation

⚔️ Pirate mobs, factions, ships, and naval battles

💣 Explosives, cannons, and gunpowder weapons

🧭 Adventure-focused gameplay with secrets, loot, and bosses

🧬 Origins or class system for pirate-style gameplay

🎮 Built for multiplayer or solo exploration

Hoist your sails. Load the cannons. And remember: dead pirates tell no tales...
